title: rosa micrantha var. oblongicalyx
intro: Rosa micrantha var. oblongicalyx, also known as the dwarf wild rose, is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Rosa micrantha var. oblongicalyx can be prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in salves and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
